message:
Command `# Verify SWD fix still in place after amuxbus removal
grep -n "swclk\|swdi\|swdo\|tck\|tms\|trst" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -10
echo "---verify module port list ends correctly---"
# Check the area around the end of port list (should end with ); )
grep -n ");" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -5` executed with exit code 0.

{"command": "# Verify SWD fix still in place after amuxbus removal
grep -n "swclk\|swdi\|swdo\|tck\|tms\|trst" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -10
echo "---verify module port list ends correctly---"
# Check the area around the end of port list (should end with ); )
grep -n ");" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -5"}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
2261:// NOTE (PnR fix): wrapper was generated with JTAG ports (tck/tms/tdi/trst_n)
2262:// but compute_ss uses SWD (swclk/swdi/swdo/swdo_en). Replaced with correct SWD
2267:    .swclk(1'b0),
2268:    .swdi(1'b0),
2269:    .swdo(),
2270:    .swdo_en(),
---verify module port list ends correctly---
1299:);
2292:);

extras.command:
# Verify SWD fix still in place after amuxbus removal
grep -n "swclk\|swdi\|swdo\|tck\|tms\|trst" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -10
echo "---verify module port list ends correctly---"
# Check the area around the end of port list (should end with ); )
grep -n ");" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -5
